meta.title: Sora Calm — Guided wellness audio for women
meta.description: Curated guided audio for stress relief, nervous system settling, and gentle embodiment — wellness only, never medical advice.

errors.routeBody: We couldn't load this screen. Nothing you wrote was shared beyond this device and our secure servers. You can try again or go back.

landing.heroTitle: Soft rituals for days that run loud
landing.heroBody: Sora Calm is intimate audio — breath, grounding, body listening, and bedside wind-down. Not therapy or medical care; a private room to settle your nervous system on your terms.
landing.wellnessOnly: Wellness only. Adult women 21+. No explicit sexual content.
landing.whyDesc: Short listens with editorial care — plain language, consent first, and the freedom to hide any collection.
landing.why1Body: Downshift stress with breath-led audio designed for real life, not perfection.
landing.why2Body: Gentle body awareness to reconnect with yourself without pressure to perform.
landing.why3Body: Bedtime relaxation and emotional aftercare when the day felt too loud.
landing.howDesc: Private, minimal data, and always your choice what you engage with.
landing.how1Body: We recommend three sessions that match how you feel.
landing.how2Body: Filter by length, tone, and category — skip anything that isn't for you.
landing.how3Body: Transcripts, speed control, and a gentle reflection after you finish.
landing.testimonial1: "Finally something that feels expensive and emotionally safe."
landing.testimonial2: "I use the five-minute reset between meetings — it actually lands."
landing.testimonial3: "The bedtime tracks are tender without being saccharine."
landing.pricingBody: Explorer opens with a curated set. Signature unlocks the full library, evening rituals, and longer resets — billing connects when Stripe is enabled in production.
landing.signatureTitle: $100 / month · built for women who hold a lot
landing.signatureBody: Full library (24+ guided sessions and growing), sequenced sleep and nervous-system paths, clear-and-kind voice work, mood-based picks, journal integration, and first access to new work. Optional add-on workbook and extended series (~$49) when checkout goes live.
signatureBullets: Editorial programs — arcs, not algorithmic shuffle
Crisis-aware language with clear paths to real-world help
Signature depth for sleep, emotional weight, and steady presence
A monthly tier that matches the craft in the room
landing.faqTherapyA: No. Sora Calm is wellness audio only. It does not diagnose or treat mental health conditions.
landing.faqExplicitA: No. Sensual wellness uses breath, embodiment, and soft language — never pornographic or graphic instructions.
landing.faqCrisisA: Use local emergency services or a crisis line. See our
landing.newsletterHint: Email capture placeholder — connect your ESP in production (e.g., Resend, Customer.io).

ageGate.title: Sora Calm is for adults 21+
ageGate.body: This product offers wellness audio for adult women. By continuing, you confirm you are at least 21 years old and you understand Sora Calm is not medical advice, not therapy, and not crisis support.

crisis.title: You deserve immediate, real-world support
crisis.body: Sora Calm is not equipped for emergencies, self-harm risk, abuse, or acute panic. If you are in danger or thinking about hurting yourself, please contact local emergency services now.
crisis.usTitle: If you are in the United States
crisis.elsewhereBody: Search for your country's crisis hotline or go to the nearest emergency department. A trusted friend, clinician, or advocate can help you connect to care.

signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.hint: Sign in to continue your calm.
signIn.demoPremium: Signature preview — full library & all premium sessions
signIn.seedHint: Create accounts with: npx prisma db push && npx prisma db seed
signIn.troubleshootBody: First link = app is alive. Second = database + demo users. If ok:false, set DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db and run npm run db:setup. Match browser URL with NEXTAUTH_URL (localhost vs 127.0.0.1).
signIn.devModeBanner: Dev mode: passwordless sign-in. For the normal form use /sign-in?manual=1 or set DEV_SKIP_LOGIN=false in .env.
signIn.devAutoFailed: Quick sign-in failed (no user in DB or DB error). Use email and password below, or run npm run db:setup.
signIn.error: Could not sign in. Check your email and password.

signUp.title: Create your space
signUp.body: Minimal data, clear boundaries. You must be 21+; confirm on the age gate before signing up.
signUp.name: Name

programs.title: Programs & paths
programs.subtitle: Structured sequences for your nervous system, sleep, boundaries, and emotional care. Open any session for the full guided script and player — your lesson is the audio + transcript together.

nervous_system.title: Nervous system reset & daily anchors
nervous_system.desc: Micro-resets, breath, and grounding when your system feels wired or scattered.

sleep_deep_rest.title: Sleep & deep rest
sleep_deep_rest.desc: Wind-down, emotionally heavy nights, and longer invitations into rest.

boundaries_confidence.title: Boundaries & quiet confidence
boundaries_confidence.desc: Before hard conversations, inner rehearsal, and steady presence.

emotional_care.title: Emotional care & softening
emotional_care.desc: After hard news, release without overwhelm, and self-held gentleness.

body_embodiment.title: Body & embodied presence
body_embodiment.desc: Reconnection, body scan, morning ritual, and consent-first sensual wellness.

overload_cycle_care.title: Overload, cycles & caregivers
overload_cycle_care.desc: Micro-pauses for mental load, cyclic sensitivity, and sensitive systems.

home.title: Your calm, held gently
home.disclaimer: Wellness audio only — not medical advice.
home.forYouDesc: Three suggestions you can play now.
home.commandLead: One listen is centered for you. The rest stays one tap away — no feed, no noise.
home.heroKicker: A private ritual space — only you, right now.
home.forNowDesc: Editorial picks — one lead, two alternates. Same consent frame; skip anything that isn’t yours.
home.tonightTitle: When the day won’t quiet down
home.tonightDesc: Wind-down and sleep-side listens — longer arcs, slower language.
home.studioDesc: Where you paused and what you marked — fast re-entry, no hunting.
home.studioEmptyRecent: No active listens. Start from Today or the catalog.
home.pathTitle: Pick up where you left off
home.pathDesc: Your recent listens, in order of last touch.
home.savedDesc: Heart something in the player and it lands here — a shelf, not a list.
home.savedEmptyDesc: When a listen feels like yours, favorite it from the player — it will appear here.
home.premiumTitle: The full studio — not a bigger playlist
home.premiumDesc: Long-form evenings, complete paths, Signature-only listens, scripts with audio. Same boundaries you set at entry.
home.libraryDesc: Rooms of content — filter fast, open what fits. Transcripts on each session page.
home.programsFootnote: Prefer a guided arc? Structured paths live here.

premium.heroTitle: The paid layer is a different product
premium.heroBody: Explorer lets you judge the room. Signature unlocks length, structure, and access — evening arcs, full paths, scripts beside audio, and every session we ship.
premium.tierEx1: Curated open catalog — enough to feel quality and tone.
premium.tierEx2: Sample wind-downs; not the full evening arc.
premium.tierSig1: Every session, including Signature-only and long-form.
premium.tierSig3: Script + audio together; journal hooks where we offer them.
premium.pillar1Body: A larger library of hand-edited sessions — not algorithmic noise.
premium.pillar2Body: Wind-downs and bedside listens when your nervous system needs a slower exit.
premium.pillar3Body: Structured arcs for sleep, boundaries, embodiment, and emotional weight.
premium.pillar4Body: Pacing that remembers you’re building a practice, not chasing a single track.
premium.pillar5Body: When you’re ready to stay in the room longer, Signature goes with you.
premium.pillar6Body: Softer tone, fewer edges — audio that feels like it was held for you.
premium.compareTitle: Explorer and Signature, side by side
premium.compareSubtitle: Explorer is your curated entry. Signature is the full private studio.

compare.libExplorer: Curated free picks — enough to feel the room.
compare.libSignature: Full curated library plus new drops as they ship.
compare.eveSignature: Evening rituals and longer sleep-side journeys.
compare.pathSignature: Complete premium paths with steady sequencing.
compare.contExplorer: Listen when you need a reset.
compare.contSignature: Rhythm across sessions — your arc stays coherent.
compare.deepSignature: Deeper, longer sessions when you want to stay.
compare.expSignature: Calmer, more intimate guidance — still pause-anytime.

premium.closingTitle: Checkout connects when your operator turns it on
premium.closingBody: Until then, Explorer stays usable. When billing is live, you finish in account settings — nothing here is medical care or crisis support.
premium.billingNote: Payment runs through secure checkout when enabled for your account. Nothing here is medical care or crisis support.
premium.activeTitle: Signature is active on this account
premium.activeBody: The full library, paths, and evening layer are yours. Pick up wherever you left off.

library.title: Catalog
library.subtitle: Collections first — then sessions. Each page holds the script when you want to read with the audio.

session.favoritedYes: Favorited: yes — use the player to toggle.
session.favoritedNo: Favorited: no — use the player to toggle.
session.favoriteHintYes: On your shelf — change anytime with the heart in the player.
session.favoriteHintNo: Heart this ritual in the player when it feels like yours.
session.premiumBody: This session lives in Signature. The full picture is on the Signature page.
session.gateBody: This track is Signature-only: full length, script with play, and the evening layer. Your onboarding boundaries still apply.
session.transcriptHeading: Script — read along if you like
session.transcriptHint: Each block is optional. Most people simply press play; open a section only when you want to skim or read with the audio.
session.transcriptLockedBody: The full guided script travels with listening access. With Signature you can play and unfold each section at your pace.
session.journalBody: An optional prompt — private to your account. Write a line or skip; the ritual is complete either way.
session.hiddenSensual: You've chosen to hide sensual wellness content. You can update this in profile.

play.wellnessOnly: Wellness audio only. Pause anytime. Nothing here replaces professional care.
play.browserVoiceMissing: Audio file unavailable — using browser voice.
play.browserVoiceDefault: Browser voice — add studio TTS or upload MP3 for file playback.
play.reflectionPlaceholder: A word, a sensation, or a breath of relief — optional.
play.ttsExplainer: You are hearing the full session text read aloud (browser voice). In production, replace with studio-recorded narration per session — upload MP3 in Studio or connect TTS.

favorites.title: Saved
favorites.subtitle: Rituals you have marked as yours — a private shelf.
favorites.emptyDesc: Tap the heart in the player to keep a listen within reach.

recent.title: Recent
recent.subtitle: Where you left off — most recent touch first.
recent.emptyDesc: Sessions you open will appear here in order of last listen.

profile.title: Profile & preferences
profile.subtitle: Update how Sora Calm meets you. Wellness only — not medical or therapeutic services.
profile.skipFeed: Hide sensual wellness from home recommendations

settings.title: Settings & account
settings.stripeStub: Stripe checkout is stubbed — wire webhooks and Customer Portal post-MVP.
settings.signatureCardLead: The full edited library, evening rituals, sequenced paths, and deeper continuity — one membership when checkout is connected to your account.
settings.signaturePoint1: Every Signature session and path, including long wind-downs and soft embodiment.
settings.signaturePoint2: Keep the same privacy, consent, and pause-anytime frame you already trust.
settings.signaturePoint3: Manage billing from this account when your operator enables checkout.
settings.signatureFootnote: You can return to the Signature story anytime from home or from any locked session.
settings.signatureActiveBody: Thank you for supporting the studio. Browse the library and paths freely — your access stays on this account.
settings.explorerCardBody: Curated sessions and a clear path into the practice. Upgrade to Signature when you want the full room.
settings.disclaimer1: Sora Calm provides wellness audio only. It is not medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
settings.disclaimer2: Not for crisis situations — use emergency services or a crisis line.

journal.title: Journal
journal.subtitle: Private reflections — not therapy notes. You can export or delete in a future release.
journal.saved: Saved. Your words stay private to your account.
journal.errorSave: We couldn't save your entry. Check your connection and try again.
journal.defaultPrompt: What felt softer after your last session?

mood.title: Where are you landing right now?
mood.subtitle: One honest pick recenters your home listen. It isn’t permanent — change it the moment you shift.
mood.error: We couldn't save your check-in. Try again in a moment.

onboarding.title: Welcome in
onboarding.subtitle: A few gentle choices — then your space opens.
onboarding.saveError: We couldn't save your preferences. Please try again.
onboarding.q1Placeholder: Stress, sleep, reconnection — in your own words.
onboarding.sensualHint: Always non-explicit. You choose how it appears in your feed.
onboarding.sensualWelcomeDesc: Curated sensual wellness may appear alongside other recommendations.
onboarding.sensualOptionalDesc: We’ll surface it sparingly; you can always skip.
onboarding.sensualHiddenDesc: Hide this category entirely from recommendations.
onboarding.skipSensual: Also keep sensual wellness off my home picks
onboarding.listenMorningHint: Soft start before the day accelerates.
onboarding.listenAfternoonHint: A pause when energy dips or noise rises.
onboarding.spaceTitle: Boundaries, voice, and when you listen
onboarding.spaceDesc: Consent stays central. Voice and time-of-day tune what we prepare next — you can change all of this in profile.
onboarding.arrivalTitle: What brings you here — in your words
onboarding.arrivalDesc: Three words or three sentences. Private to your account; used to calibrate tone, not to profile you for ads.
onboarding.paceTitle: How long can you stay — and how full is today?
onboarding.paceDesc: We match session length and pacing to what you select. No scoring, no diagnosis.
onboarding.length58Hint: Micro-resets between tasks or before bed.
onboarding.length1015Hint: A fuller pause without a big time commitment.
onboarding.length15pHint: When you want to sink in and stay awhile.
onboarding.lengthVariesHint: You’ll choose per day — we’ll keep the library flexible.
onboarding.stressSectionLabel: Where your nervous system is today
onboarding.stressBandLow: We’ll lean toward softer pacing and shorter invitations.
onboarding.stressBandMid: We’ll balance grounding with room to breathe.
onboarding.stressBandHigh: We’ll prioritize downshift and containment first.
onboarding.boundariesTitle: Sensual wellness — your boundaries, clearly set
onboarding.boundariesDesc: Everything here is non-explicit and consent-first. Choose what may appear in your recommendations.
onboarding.soundTitle: How should guidance sound — and when do you listen?
onboarding.soundDesc: We’ll align future audio and defaults with the tone and time of day that feel natural to you.
onboarding.transitionBody: Preferences save to your account. Change them anytime in profile. Next: one mood check so today’s center listen fits.
onboarding.transitionBullet1: Length + stress band steer what we surface first.
onboarding.transitionBullet2: Sensual content follows the visibility and home-feed rules you chose.
onboarding.transitionBullet3: Voice + listening window prep future defaults.

cant_sleep.label: Can't sleep
cant_sleep.description: My body won't let me rest

admin.homeBody: Create sessions, generate scripts (mock or OpenAI), and run TTS (mock or OpenAI when enabled).
admin.newPageBody: Generate a draft with AI (mock without API key), preview script, then save. TTS can be run after publish from the edit screen.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: We designed Sora Calm to ask for little and protect what you share.
privacy.collectBody: Account email and password (hashed), optional display name, your preferences, listening history inside the app, favorites, mood check-ins, and journal entries you choose to save. Session scripts and titles are content metadata, not personal diary data, unless you link them via journal prompts.
privacy.dontBody: We don't sell your personal data. We don't use your journal text for advertising profiling. Analytics events are kept minimal and should not include raw journal content or passwords.
privacy.cookiesBody: We use cookies for sign-in sessions and the 21+ age confirmation where applicable. You can sign out from settings at any time.
privacy.choicesBody: You can control whether sensual wellness categories appear in your feed. You can skip any session. For data export or deletion requests, contact your deployment operator — automated self-service tools may be added post-MVP.
privacy.legalNote: This page is a product summary, not a legal instrument. Your company counsel should review before production launch.
